objectives.name: Task Pass Rate
objectives.description: Fraction of benchmark tasks where all DoD items pass

objectives.name: Average Evaluation Grade
objectives.description: Normalized grade from evaluator (A=1.0, B=0.8, C=0.6, D=0.4, F=0.0)

objectives.name: Average Rounds to Pass
objectives.description: Mean number of BUILD→EVAL rounds needed

objectives.name: Stuck/Stall Rate
objectives.description: Fraction of tasks where the harness got stuck or timed out

objectives.name: Definition-of-Done Coverage
objectives.description: Fraction of benchmark DoD items passed across the whole task set

objectives.name: Artifact Validity Rate
objectives.description: Fraction of required artifacts produced and structurally present

objectives.name: Average Token Cost
objectives.description: Mean total tokens (input+output) across all agents per task

objectives.name: Regression Rate
objectives.description: Fraction of tasks that passed with baseline but fail with this candidate

composite_score: 0.35 * pass_rate + 0.25 * eval_grade + 0.1 * (1 - norm(avg_rounds)) + 0.05 * (1 - norm(avg_time_seconds)) + 0.08 * (1 - stuck_rate) + 0.07 * dod_coverage + 0.05 * artifact_validity_rate + 0.05 * (1 - regression_rate)
